name: Bellringer Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 medium head romaine lettuce, torn into small pieces
1 medium head iceberg lettuce, torn into small pieces
3/4 cup ripe olives, pitted and sliced lengthwise
6 oz jar marinated artichoke hearts, drained
7 oz can water-packed tuna, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub a large salad bowl with halved garlic.
2. In the bowl, combine torn lettuce, vegetables, and tuna; toss lightly with 1 cup French Mustard Salad Dressing.
3. Arrange tomato wedges, hard-boiled eggs, and cheese cubes over the salad.
4. Spoon remaining dressing on top of the salad.
5. Sprinkle with croutons.
French Mustard Salad Dressing:
1. Combine prepared mustard, egg, salt, hot sauce, cider vinegar, instant minced onion in a blender container.
2. Process on high speed until well blended.
3. Gradually add oil while continuing to blend.
4. The dressing will thicken as the oil is added. If not used immediately, beat well before serving.
5. Yield: about 1 1/4 cups.
